headline: Starter picks while I learn your taste — react to anything and I'll re-query.

sections.heading: Weekend adventure — a full curated look
sections.blurb: A real human-curated outfit from the dataset (set 118506459): checked blouse anchored by neutral denim, with the bag echoing the top's pattern.

items.name: carven checked cross-over blouse
items.reason: The focal point — one pattern, everything else stays quiet.

items.name: blugirl white black lizard print
items.reason: Echoes the black/white of the blouse — repetition creates unity.

sections.heading: Weekend away — dressier take
sections.blurb: Another curated set (122355105): same casual register, one notch dressier.

items.name: giuseppe zanotti suede embellished lace-up
items.reason: The statement piece of this look.

sections.heading: Wildcards — tell me which of these you'd actually wear
sections.blurb: Deliberately different directions so I can calibrate. Yes/no on each teaches me more than a whole outfit.
